title: grammitis sarawakensis
intro: Grammitis sarawakensis is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Borneo and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Grammitis sarawakensis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a poultice by applying the crushed leaves directly to the affected area.
